sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22572" key="goggulwpo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γογγῠλ-ωπός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n22572.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">round-faced, stout-looking</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
